null_reconstruction.bridge_coordinate: stable within-minute retained trade rank i/(n-1); a single-trade minute uses coordinate zero
null_reconstruction.real_residual: real integer quarter-tick minus the exact rational bridge joining the first and last real retained ticks
null_reconstruction.null_bridge: exact rational bridge joining the preregistered null minute open and close, each first rounded to an integer ES quarter-tick
null_reconstruction.reconstructed_tick: null bridge plus frozen real residual, rounded to nearest integer quarter-tick; exact half-tick ties choose the lower tick
null_reconstruction.minute_ohlc_policy: first, maximum, minimum and last reconstructed tick converted at USD 0.25 per tick
null_reconstruction.minute_vwap_policy: reconstructed tick weighted by invariant trade size

funnel_implementation.walk_forward_purge: holding horizon through nonoverlapping signal construction

CONTRE: Rank-based residual reconstruction preserves the ordering geometry of real within-minute prints and can therefore be conservative for occupancy motifs; the class verdict must still follow the preregistered NULL_RATIO and exact-binomial policy without reinterpretation.
